@graph.name: PhyFix
@graph.description: Expert online Physics and Maths tutoring for IB, IGCSE, A-Level, AP and CBSE students.

mainEntity.name: How do I find a good online physics tutor?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix offers verified expert physics tutors with 4–15 years of experience across IB, IGCSE, A-Level, AP, and CBSE. You can browse tutor profiles, read ratings, and book a free demo class before committing.

mainEntity.name: How much does online physics tutoring cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix physics tutoring rates range from ₹500 to ₹2,000 per hour depending on the tutor and level. Students pay tutors directly — PhyFix charges zero commission. School-level starts at $10/hr.

mainEntity.name: Can I get a free trial physics class?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Every new PhyFix student gets a free 1-hour demo class with no commitment and no credit card required. Book via WhatsApp at +91 8684901516.

mainEntity.name: Which physics boards do PhyFix tutors cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix tutors cover IB Physics (SL & HL), Cambridge IGCSE Physics (0625), A-Level Physics (AQA, Edexcel, OCR, Cambridge), AP Physics 1, 2 & C, CBSE Class 9–12 Physics, ICSE, and JEE/NEET Physics.

mainEntity.name: How do I find a good online maths tutor?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix offers verified maths tutors with expertise in IB Maths AA & AI, IGCSE Maths (0580), A-Level Maths, AP Calculus AB & BC, and CBSE Mathematics. Book a free demo class to find the right match.

mainEntity.name: How much does online maths tutoring cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix maths tutoring rates range from ₹500 to ₹3,000 per hour depending on tutor and level. Zero commission — you pay the tutor directly. Starting from $10/hr for school level.

mainEntity.name: Can I get help with IB Maths IA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PhyFix tutors specialise in IB Mathematics Internal Assessment support, helping students choose appropriate topics, structure their exploration, and achieve Level 4 scores.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer IGCSE Maths tutoring?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PhyFix offers expert Cambridge IGCSE Maths (0580) tutoring for both Core and Extended levels, with past-paper focus and grade 8/9 strategies.
